metadata.name: Worker Onboarding Loop Template
metadata.description: Run one Agent Cloud type through research, contracts, implementation, verification, and independent review.

objective.user_goal: Bring one selected Worker slug to a verifiable, Definition-driven integration state.
objective.business_value: Make each Worker type independently supportable without duplicating credential, form, backend, Runner, or image logic.
objective.done_definition: All seven Worker tasks have acceptance evidence and the Worker terminal verifier exits 0 for the selected slug.
non_goals: Do not publish a runtime image.
Do not use real credentials without human approval.
Do not accept unsupported behavior through fallback.

ambiguity_triggers: credential mapping has no declared target

secondary_user_query.prompt: What approved decision should resolve this selected Worker's license, protocol, credential, or public-contract ambiguity?

assumption_policy.allowed: Only low-risk research ordering and evidence organization may be assumed.

block_if: upstream license or redistribution status is unclear
public API or migration changes lack approval

split_until: one task has one Worker slug
one task has deterministic verifier evidence
decomposition_policy.minimum_task_granularity: one research, contract, frontend-backend, Runner-runtime, verification, or review slice for one Worker
decomposition_policy.dependency_policy: Research and contract evidence precede implementation; review can accept only terminal verifier evidence.

loop_nodes.purpose: Advance one Worker through explicit research, implementation, verification, and review stages.

children.purpose: Convert official upstream evidence into one explicit Worker definition and credential-document contract.
steps: request a human decision when blocked

children.purpose: Implement Worker-specific form, API, Runner, and runtime changes until deterministic checks pass.
entry_conditions: research and contract tasks are accepted

atomic_tasks.goal: Research the selected Worker from official sources and record installation, version, license, protocol, auth, configuration, persistence, and platform evidence.
acceptance_criteria: required research categories have official or captured-command evidence
unknown conclusions are recorded as blockers

atomic_tasks.goal: Define the selected Worker identity, adapter, modes, capabilities, AgentFile alignment, and configuration documents.
acceptance_criteria: Definition schema and AgentFile alignment pass
adapter_id and interaction modes are explicit

atomic_tasks.goal: Define credential references, required conditions, injection targets, configuration document schemas, and frontend field metadata.
acceptance_criteria: all secrets are references with declared env or document targets
form required and conditional behavior is declared

atomic_tasks.goal: Implement the selected Worker Definition through backend APIs, proto and Rust Core mappings, and frontend form behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Definition version and hash survive backend, proto, Rust Core, and Web mapping
form tests cover success, loading, error, disabled, and incompatible states

atomic_tasks.goal: Implement the selected Worker Runner adapter, runtime image path, binary probe, and immutable catalog integration.
acceptance_criteria: Runner resolves exact adapter_id without fallback
runtime image uses a real pinned artifact and passes version probing

atomic_tasks.goal: Run Definition, API, Runner, image, PTY or ACP, and browser checks for the selected Worker.
acceptance_criteria: all deterministic Worker checks pass
browser evidence covers creation success and critical failure paths

atomic_tasks.goal: Independently review the selected Worker evidence and reject unsupported, secret-bearing, or fallback-based acceptance.
acceptance_criteria: review confirms all evidence is verifier-backed
review confirms no fallback, mock artifact, or plaintext secret is accepted

responsibilities: perform one scoped research or implementation task

allowed_when: research, frontend-backend, and Runner-runtime tasks have disjoint write paths
one selected Worker exceeds primary context budget
disallowed_when: two agents would edit the same shared contract or verifier
subagent_activation.token_budget_policy: Subagents return only decisions, changed paths, commands, exit codes, and evidence references under 2000 tokens.

context_policy.tool_output_trimming: Keep commands, exit codes, failing assertions, changed paths, and evidence references; exclude raw logs and secrets.

compaction.summary_contract: Preserve the selected Worker, task state, verifier evidence, blockers, decisions, and human gates.

success: all seven Worker tasks are accepted
failure: license or protocol evidence remains unknown
a protected verifier must be weakened

anti_gaming_rules: do not replace a real artifact with a mock binary

cost_policy.optimization_goal: Keep one Worker context isolated while using independent review and deterministic verification.

user_confirmation.prompt: May the decision proxy make only the listed low-risk sequencing and public-metadata retry decisions?

drift_checks: selected Worker remains the worker.json slug
active task maps to Worker acceptance
shared contract work has explicit ownership
no human gate is silently crossed

escalation_required_when: the Worker cannot reach terminal verification
a security or public API decision is needed

forbidden_behaviors: using mock binaries as real Worker artifacts

portability_policy.platform_selection_query: Which execution adapter should run this Worker loop?

failure_modes.mitigation: Reject execution until worker.json names one valid formal slug.
Block the Worker when an official or captured-command source is unavailable.
Load only the selected Worker evidence pack and require Definition hash checks.
Protect verifier paths and require independent review.

acceptance_checklist.update_policy: Mark an item only after all criteria pass with durable evidence.

items.description: Research the selected Worker from official sources.
acceptance_criteria: required research categories have official or captured-command evidence
unknown conclusions are recorded as blockers
Definition schema and AgentFile alignment pass
adapter_id and interaction modes are explicit
all secrets are references with declared env or document targets
form required and conditional behavior is declared

items.description: Implement frontend and backend contract surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Definition version and hash survive backend, proto, Rust Core, and Web mapping
form tests cover success, loading, error, disabled, and incompatible states

items.description: Implement Runner adapter and runtime support.
acceptance_criteria: Runner resolves exact adapter_id without fallback
runtime image uses a real pinned artifact and passes version probing
all deterministic Worker checks pass
browser evidence covers creation success and critical failure paths

items.description: Independently accept or reject Worker evidence.
acceptance_criteria: review confirms all evidence is verifier-backed
review confirms no fallback, mock artifact, or plaintext secret is accepted

escalation.condition: A human gate, blocker, budget exit, or no-progress exit is reached.
